title: gmaio pipeline parameters
description: Genome & metagenome all-in-one: isolate/metagenome x Illumina/Nanopore

input.description: Path to the samplesheet CSV (not required for --mode download_dbs).

container_base.description: Directory holding local .sif images for bespoke tools.

aviary_container.description: Optional explicit Aviary .sif path. If unset, AVIARY_RECOVER uses ${container_base}/aviary_0.13.0.sif.

databases.title: Reference databases
databases.description: Paths to pre-built databases. Override per profile, or build with --mode download_dbs.

rpkm_singlem_marker_dbs.description: Optional directory of prebuilt SingleM marker DIAMOND .dmnd files for RPKM normalization.

rpkm_singlem_marker_lengths.description: Optional SingleM marker stats TSV for RPKM normalization; must contain Gene and avg_len columns.

sylph_db.description: Sylph database — path or glob of the .syldb file(s) to profile against.

sylph_tax_metadata.description: sylph-tax metadata path/glob matching the selected sylph_db files; set to enable taxonomy + merge.

amrfinder_db.description: AMRFinderPlus DB dir (null = use container's bundled DB).

host_ref.description: Host reference FASTA used to build a Cleanifier index when cleanifier_db is not supplied.

cleanifier_db.description: Pre-built Cleanifier .filter index. If unset, host_ref is indexed with cleanifier index.

cleanifier_nobjects.description: Optional -n/--nobjects override for cleanifier index; defaults to estimated FASTA bases.

bakta_reference_proteins.description: Optional proteins/GBFF file passed to Bakta --proteins.

reference_genomes.description: Directory of external reference genome FASTAs (metagenome modes). When set, references are dereplicated together with the HQ MAGs, reads are mapped to that combined set, and reference proteins are added to an expanded gene catalogue (+DRAM+RPKM).

reference_genome_extension.description: Comma-separated file extensions to glob under reference_genomes (gzipped inputs are decompressed).

reference_genomes_checkm2.description: Optional CheckM2 quality_report.tsv for the reference genomes; every reference must appear in it or the run fails. If unset, CheckM2 is run on the references.

reference_genomes_taxonomy.description: Classify the reference genomes with GTDB-Tk. They are renamed with a reserved prefix before GTDB-Tk (to avoid GCA_/GCF_ accession collisions) and appear in the published GTDB-Tk summary with their original names restored (metagenome modes).

download_db.description: Comma-list of DB names or 'all' (only with --mode download_dbs).

hq_quality_source.description: Which CheckM report(s) classify a bin as HQ; a bin is HQ if it passes in any selected report.

within_sample_dereplication.description: Dereplicate bins within each sample ('sample') or each samplesheet group ('group'), selecting HQ MAGs within that unit; 'none' disables it. Independent of skip_dereplication (across-all-samples): across-only = skip_dereplication false + none; within-only = skip_dereplication true + sample/group; both = skip_dereplication false + sample/group.

run_marker_tree.description: Build a marker-gene tree of MAGs + selected GTDB references after GTDB-Tk (metagenome modes).

catalogue_identities.description: Comma-separated CD-HIT identities; first is the primary catalogue (used for CDS/membership/DRAM).

rpkm_min_read_length.description: Minimum selected R1 read length retained for RPKM DIAMOND blastx.

sylph_profile_args.description: Optional extra arguments for sylph profile.

marker_tree_builder.description: Tree builder for the metagenome marker-gene tree.

marker_tree_genome_source.description: Which user genomes to place in the marker-gene tree. 'hq_representatives' uses the pipeline's high-quality representatives (completeness - 3x contamination >= 50) and bypasses the min_completeness/max_contamination filter.

marker_tree_min_completeness.description: CheckM2 completeness threshold for genomes placed in the marker-gene tree.

marker_tree_max_contamination.description: CheckM2 contamination threshold for genomes placed in the marker-gene tree.

marker_tree_use_closest.description: Select closest reference genomes by GTDB-Tk tree topology.

marker_tree_use_related.description: Select one reference per order sharing a bin's order but not its family.

marker_tree_closest_n.description: Number of closest reference leaves per genome.

marker_tree_exclude_pattern.description: Extra regex to exclude leaf names when selecting closest references.

marker_tree_reference_accessions.description: Optional file of GB_/RS_ accessions to add to the marker-gene tree verbatim.

marker_tree_include_references.description: Place the external --reference_genomes in the marker-gene tree alongside the MAGs. Requires --reference_genomes and runs GTDB-Tk on the references (they are always placed, regardless of CheckM2 quality).

dorado_barcode_kit.description: Optional Dorado barcode kit name for POD5 basecalling/demux.

comparison_manifest.description: Optional manifest assigning sample/reference rows to comparison groups.

samples_include.description: Optional sample id list used only for fallback samplesheet group comparisons.

chewbbaca_cgmlst_thresholds.description: Space-separated thresholds passed to chewBBACA ExtractCgMLST.
